prompt: Can weeds be put into compost, or will they grow again when the compost is used?
evidence: I usually discard weeds but it occurred to me that they would probably be good for compost. Are there any steps I can take to use them in compost without having them grow again when I use the compost? Do different types of weeds need different treatment prior to composting? The main weeds I have are dandelions and "farmers friend".
